data/maps/MtPyre_3F/text.inc.MtPyre_3F_Text_19672B: The rich atmosphere of the mountain\nhas elevated my psychic power!\pA mere child like you...\nYou dream of winning?
data/maps/MtPyre_3F/text.inc.MtPyre_3F_Text_1967B5: My psychic powers have surely\ngrown several times, but...
data/maps/MtPyre_3F/text.inc.MtPyre_3F_Text_1967EF: Ahahahaha!\pThis is no place for children, least\nof all you!
data/maps/MtPyre_3F/text.inc.MtPyre_3F_Text_196842: This means my training is still not\nenough...\pI've got to keep working toward the\nsummit...\pGo, me!
